site.title: LED & Illuminated Signs | ION Print & Promo
site.description: Custom LED & illuminated signs for storefronts, buildings & outdoor spaces. Energy-efficient, high-visibility signage designed & installed by experienced local professionals.

hero.title: LED Signs
hero.imageAlt: Custom LED and illuminated signs for businesses

centreText.title: Shine A Light
centreText.description: Shine a light on your organization! LED & illuminated signs help your business stay visible & look great, even after the sun goes down.

featureImage.imageAlt: Custom LED and illuminated storefront signage

features.title: LED Signs & Digital Displays
features.description:
Need flexibility & the ability to update your message? LED & digital signs give you the power to change content quickly & keep things current.

  • Promotions & daily specials
  • Schools, community centres & businesses
  • Event messaging & announcements
  • High-traffic roadside visibility

We'll help you choose the right size, resolution & placement to maximize impact.

features.title: Channel Letters & Backlit Signage
features.description:
For a clean, high-end look, illuminated channel letters & backlit signs are a popular choice for storefronts & commercial buildings.

  • LED channel letters, including front-lit & halo-lit
  • Backlit cabinet signs
  • Illuminated logos & branding elements
  • Building-mounted illuminated signage

These signs offer strong visibility, excellent readability & a polished appearance that reflects your brand.

features.title: Efficient, Durable & Eye-Catching
features.description:
Modern LED signage is built to last. We make the process easy from start to finish, giving you energy-efficient performance along with a streamlined experience handled by one team.

  • Lower energy consumption & operating costs
  • Long lifespan with minimal maintenance
  • Consistent brightness & clarity

From design & layout to material selection, fabrication, wiring & professional installation, we take care of the details so your sign looks great & works the way it should.
